title: TIP-1.0 Telemetry Event
description: One row per request in the telemetry store (~/.tokenpak/telemetry.db). Written only by services.telemetry_service per Architecture §7.1. Normative field set for TIP-1.0; additive MINOR bumps may extend it, MAJOR bumps may break it. See https://docs.tokenpak.ai/protocol/telemetry-semantics.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of request arrival at the proxy.

tip_version.description: TIP version under which this event was emitted.

provider.description: Outbound provider canonical name; null if the request never reached a provider (cache hit, policy reject).

model.description: Model identifier; null when provider is null.

cache_origin.description: REQUIRED. Classification of any cache hit attribution for this request. 'proxy' = TokenPak cache served response; 'client' = provider cache served it; 'unknown' = cannot attribute. NEVER over-claim (Constitution §5.3).

status.description: HTTP-style status code of the response (200, 401, 429, 500, etc.). 0 if the request was rejected before any response shape existed.

error_code.description: TIP error code if the request failed (see error.schema.json); null on success.

savings_tokens.description: Compression savings in tokens. Cache savings are reported separately in savings_cache_tokens — never sum them.

savings_cache_tokens.description: Cache-attributable token savings. Classification by cache_origin.

compression_ms.description: Milliseconds spent in services.compression_service. Part of the overhead budget.

proxy_ms.description: Milliseconds spent in services pipeline excluding provider round-trip.

provider_ms.description: Milliseconds the provider took (measured from outbound request dispatch to response-body first byte).

tokens_in.description: Input tokens billed by the provider for this request (from response usage or body parse).

tokens_out.description: Output tokens billed by the provider.

capabilities_negotiated.description: Capability labels that were active for this request (MCP intersection or proxy-side defaults).

ext.description: Namespaced extension fields per docs/protocol/extension-model.md. Core fields MUST NOT be shadowed here.
